_comment: Learned patterns from real-world MCP repo scans. Loaded by MCPSecurityScanner at init.

code_patterns._note: eval() in MCP tool handler = code injection. Any LLM-supplied argument reaching eval is RCE. Discovered during modelcontextprotocol/servers review.
Dynamic require() with user-controlled input enables module injection.
Shell execution in MCP handler with user-controlled params = command injection.
Tool handler reads credential from process.env — all registered tools inherit this env scope. Ensure least-privilege env per tool.

SSRF optional-allowlist: domain check only fires when allowlist is non-empty. Empty allowlist (default) permits all URLs including RFC1918/metadata endpoints. Discovered: modelcontextprotocol/servers gzip-file-as-resource.ts scan 2026-02-27.
Cloud metadata endpoint hardcoded or reachable. SSRF to this endpoint leaks IAM credentials.

config_patterns._note: npx -y installs latest npm package without version pinning. If registry package is compromised, auto-installs malicious code. Discovered: pinecone-io/pinecone-claude-code-plugin scan 2026-02-27. Fix: pin version with @x.y.z suffix.
MCP HTTP transport declared without explicit auth field. Verify server-side auth is enforced even when not in config.
